goal: Complete T0301-T0307 with deterministic full-mailbox discovery, fail-closed sender verification, byte-exact Gmail RAW handling, bounded attachment inspection and encrypted append-only Raw commit boundaries without production authority.
scope: message-level All Mail, Inbox, Spam and Trash discovery with complete pagination
Gmail History incremental sync with deterministic full-reconciliation fallback
versioned verified-sender registry that is empty until protected evidence exists
independent pre-RAW and pre-M3 sender, authentication and fingerprint verification
byte-exact Gmail RAW base64url decode and RFC message preservation
bounded PDF, XLSX and CSV attachment inspection with quarantine
opaque content addressing, official age encryption and append-only private-first Raw planning
local synthetic Stage 3 evidence and no-Secret CI definition
non_goals: real Gmail authorization, message access or mutation
activation of any production sender entry without protected first-party evidence
real private repository lookup, write, recovery or public evidence publication
Processed parsing, timeline publishing, production scheduling or deployment
protected_oracles: authoritative owner-approved Moomoo AU sender evidence and production registry activation
real Gmail RAW byte parity for verified source messages
real private GitHub append and remote recovery verification
AC-023 deployed 04:30 Australia/Sydney schedule and compensation
rollback: Revert the single local Stage 3 commit; Stage 2 remains at its pinned verified commit and no remote state has changed.
stop_conditions: frozen Stage 0 manifest or cumulative Stage 2 gate drifts
real or sensitive sender, message, credential or repository data enters the publishable tree
an unverified candidate can receive a RAW permit
plaintext can reach a persistence adapter
untrusted attachment content can execute, escape a path or access a network
a protected oracle would require credential, mailbox or remote-write authority
Stage 4 behavior is required to make a Stage 3 local gate pass
